title: Savory Sharp American Cheese Casserole
description: A nostalgic American dish featuring a blend of cheeses, mustard, and tangy sherry vinegar, with a twist of nuka-pickle for added depth, all while being shojin-friendly.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
Cook the macaroni according to package instructions until al dente, then set aside.
In a saucepan, melt the butter over medium heat.
Add the flour and whisk to combine, cooking for 1 minute.
Slowly pour in 1 cup of milk, whisking constantly to avoid lumps.
Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook until it thickens, stirring occasionally.
Remove the sauce from the heat and stir in the shredded cheddar cheese until melted.
Add the sliced American cheese, Dijon mustard, sherry vinegar, and chopped nuka-pickle to the cheese sauce, stirring until well combined.
In a large mixing bowl, combine the cooked macaroni and cheese sauce, stirring until the pasta is well coated.
Transfer the macaroni mixture to a baking dish and top with additional shredded cheese if desired.
